name: Cheesecake (Easy & Delicious)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and beat until smooth.
3. Stir in the lemon juice and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Chill for about 3 hours or until set.
6. Top with desired amount of pie filling before serving.
7. Keep chilled!
